india_trends.title: RBI imposes penalty on Bandhan Bank, Muthoot Housing Finance Company
india_trends.summary: While imposing a penalty on Bandhan Bank, the RBI said the bank failed to carry out periodic review of risk categorisation of certain categories of accounts, and had sanctioned director-related loans.

india_trends.title: Infosys approves ₹51.75-crore stock incentives for CEO Salil Parekh
india_trends.summary: The annual performance-based stock incentives or Annual Performance Equity Grant is in the form of Restricted Stock Units covering the company’s equity shares

india_trends.title: GIFT Nifty jumps 110 points on Iran-US peace talk hopes; Nifty seen reclaiming 24K on Monday
india_trends.summary: GIFT Nifty surged 110 points on hopes of renewed Iran-US peace talks, boosting sentiment after weak markets. Positive global cues could help Nifty 50 reclaim 24,000 despite recent declines driven by IT-led selling pressure.

india_trends.title: ‘Aim for 100% ethanol blending’: Nitin Gadkari cites West Asia crisis for energy self-reliance
US stocks today: S&P 500, Nasdaq open higher on fresh hopes of US-Iran talks
india_trends.summary: U.S. stock markets saw gains on Friday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite climbing. Renewed optimism surrounding potential U.S.-Iran negotiations to de-escalate conflict boosted market sentiment. A significant rise in Intel shares also provided additional support to the indices.

india_trends.title: Indian bonds post first weekly decline in three as oil resumes upward journey
india_trends.summary: Indian government bonds were little ​changed on Friday, but ​posted their first weekly decline since April 3, as ​oil prices started climbing again, with market participants seeing no resolution to the U.S.-Iran conflict.

india_trends.title: From marble to door handles: How ultra-luxury housing is reshaping India’s hardware industry
india_trends.summary: India's ultra-luxury housing boom is elevating building hardware from a functional necessity to a critical design element. Developers and homeowners now demand sophisticated craftsmanship and global quality standards, pushing manufacturers towards better processes and tighter quality control. Archit

india_trends.title: Actis picks Standard Chartered to kick off $2 billion sale of BluPine
india_trends.summary: Actis is selling its Indian renewable energy firm BluPine Energy. The company has a capacity of 4 gigawatts. Standard Chartered Bank is advising on the sale. The price tag is $2 billion. This follows Actis's previous successful sales of renewable energy platforms in India. Deal activity in the secto

india_trends.title: SEBI allows net settlement of funds for FPIs
india_trends.summary: The move is aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and reducing the cost of funding for FPIs, especially on index rebalancing days

india_trends.title: Volatile gold slows Bluestone’s FY27 store expansion pace
india_trends.summary: Bluestone Jewellery and Lifestyle now expects a more measured pace of expansion of about 20% annually, well short of its FY27 500-store target.

india_trends.title: GE Vernova among 7 mid-cap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 30% in a month
india_trends.summary: Despite a 999-point drop in the BSE Sensex, seven BSE 150 midcap stocks hit 52-week highs, signalling strong momentum in select sectors, with notable gains in power, finance, steel and pharmaceuticals over the past month.

india_trends.title: Gainers & Losers: Infosys, Adani Energy among 7 big movers on Friday
india_trends.summary: Indian markets fell sharply with BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 declining amid heavy IT selling. Stocks like Infosys dropped, while select firms including Himadri Speciality Chemical and Adani Energy Solutions gained on earnings and momentum.

india_trends.title: Sebi clears 4 IPOs including Yatayat Corporation and EAAA India Alternatives
india_trends.summary: Sebi has approved IPOs for four firms spanning logistics, alternatives, real estate and manufacturing. Companies aim to tap rising demand across sectors, though competitive pressures, cyclicality and evolving investor preferences may shape their growth and market reception.

india_trends.title: The great un-bundling: How maturing Indian markets are shrugging off concentration
india_trends.summary: Over the past three decades, global markets have undergone a marked shift in sectoral composition

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50 Aayush Wellness jumps 9% despite bloodbath on Dalal Street
india_trends.summary: Aayush Wellness shares rose 9% to ₹39, hitting a three-month high, with a cumulative gain of 21% over two days. The company launched Liver Care Tablets to address liver health concerns, aiming to capture growth in the nutraceutical market, projected at $18 billion.

india_trends.title: Govt misses FY26 highway construction target due to delay in land acquisition
india_trends.summary: National highway construction in the last fiscal year reached 9,380 km, falling short of the 10,000 km target. This marks the slowest pace since 2017-18. Delays in land acquisition and securing clearances contributed to the shortfall. The pace of awarding new highway projects also saw a significant

india_trends.title: India to introduce barrier-free tolling using FASTag, AI cameras by December: Gadkari
india_trends.summary: India is set to introduce seamless, barrier-free tolling on national highways by December. This advanced system will use technologies like ANPR and FASTag for automatic toll collection. Vehicles will not need to stop at toll plazas.
